gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 found that re-evaluating the public EngineKVProbeFactoryResult base after clean import could break legacy factory-result recognition after later public mutation. I pinned the cloned namespace type to the legacy class import-time base, added a regression, reran verification, and re-review returned approval.
verification: poetry run pytest tests/test_engine_probe.py tests/test_engine_adapters.py tests/test_public_package.py tests/test_project_governance.py -q
what_changed: Hardened restaurant_kv_serving.engine_probe class-base selection for EngineKVProbeConfig, EngineKVProbeFactoryContext, and EngineKVProbeFactoryResult.
Preserved clean-import public subclass relationships while falling back to source-loaded defaults after pre-import public class replacement or mutation.
Stabilized the cloned document namespace factory-result type check against post-import public result-class mutations.
why: The native engine probe path is the package boundary for established vLLM/SGLang connector validation, so legacy compatibility must not capture import-order public class mutations as defaults.
